title: Enhanced Health And Hunger Bar
description: This makes it so that the health and hunger bar look better than the original. Simple and light weight resourcepack, works and every health effect and mob health.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f3c8b1ed67dfe1f72102343bff0dc3a28333444.png)

# What Does this change?
This resourcepack changes every heart and even mob hearts! Gives it a more textured design.
This also changes every hungerbar and the hunger effected on that bar into a more fuller food icon.

## Hearts
![Hearts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee66a5b3bb5d9bbdc7d59a8fb763f34b20d18add.png)
This has both hardcore and regular hearts, even mob hearts like the horse!

## Hunger
![food](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7acea8ecbeb6d32be03265756da1abe3ec63e4ad.png)

This makes the food bar more full with these icons!
